section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports neurovascularly his lower extremities are intact and has a muscle strength of 5/5.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Neurovascular status and muscle strength are typically clinician-assessed objective exam findings; phrasing as patient-reported is atypical and could mislead a reader about how these findings were obtained.

section_miscategorizations.text: An MRI is ordered to evaluate the integrity of the ACL.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Ordering imaging is a management action and belongs in the Plan, not in the Assessment.

section_miscategorizations.text: Management will initially focus on stabilizing the knee with a knee immobilizer and crutches to minimize stress.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Description of intended management (knee immobilizer and crutches) is part of the treatment plan rather than diagnostic assessment.
